meta.intent: Quant-first theme seeds for CN A-shares. Build Core pool first for mid/low frequency strategies. This file is intentionally small and human-curated; expansion will be generated from data.
notes: Seeds are NOT investment advice; they are a starting universe for data collection and model research.
Prefer liquid, representative names; avoid microcaps.

Aerospace/defense anchors; will later refine with liquidity filter.
